# ContentForge

> AI-powered content calendar generator that turns one brief into a week of on-brand posts for LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, newsletters, and blogs — with scheduling, exports, and brand-safe hashtag rules.

ContentForge is a web app for content teams and solo operators. Users describe their brand once (voice, audience, goals, banned phrases, hashtag rules), then generate full weekly calendars or single posts tuned per platform. Includes a timezone-aware scheduler, ICS/CSV/Markdown/PDF exports, reusable brief templates, and draft auto-recovery.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how-it-works.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Authentication for the app (email + Google).

## Optional

- [App](/app): The authenticated workspace (requires sign-in).
